title: Top-level configuration schema for the dprint SVG plugin.
description:
All fields are optional — omitted values fall back to dprint global
config or built-in defaults.

attributesPerLine.description: Maximum number of attributes per line in multi-line mode.

blankLines.description: How blank lines between sibling elements are handled.

formatEmbeddedContent.description: Whether to delegate embedded content (CSS, JS, HTML) to host plugins.

indentWidth.description: Indent width when useTabs is false.

lineWidth.description:
Fallback line width for formatting decisions when maxInlineTagWidth is
not provided.

locked.description: Whether the configuration is not allowed to be overridden or extended.

maxInlineTagWidth.description: Maximum inline tag width before wrapping attributes or children.

spaceBeforeSelfClose.description: Whether to include a space before '/>' in self-closing tags.

useTabs.description: Use tabs for indentation instead of spaces.

AttributeLayoutConfig.title: Attribute wrapping mode exposed in the plugin config.
AttributeLayoutConfig.description:
Maps 1:1 to [`svg_format::AttributeLayout`].

```svg
<!-- auto: wraps when inline exceeds maxInlineTagWidth -->
<linearGradient
    id="sky"
    x1="0%"
    y1="0%">
</linearGradient>

<!-- single-line: always one line -->
<linearGradient id="sky" x1="0%" y1="0%"></linearGradient>

<!-- multi-line: always wrap -->
<rect
    id="box"
    x="10" />
```

oneOf.description: Wrap only when inline width exceeds `maxInlineTagWidth`.
Always keep all attributes on one line.
Always wrap attributes onto separate lines.

AttributeSortConfig.title: Attribute ordering strategy exposed in the plugin config.
AttributeSortConfig.description:
Maps 1:1 to [`svg_format::AttributeSort`].

```svg
<!-- input -->
<rect y="20" x="10" height="50" width="100" id="box" />

<!-- canonical (default) -->
<rect id="box" x="10" y="20" width="100" height="50" />

<!-- alphabetical -->
<rect height="50" id="box" width="100" x="10" y="20" />
```

oneOf.description: SVG-aware canonical grouping (id, class, geometry, presentation, ...).

BlankLinesConfig.title: How blank lines between sibling elements are handled.
BlankLinesConfig.description:
Maps 1:1 to [`svg_format::BlankLines`].

```svg
<!-- input -->
<svg>
    <rect />


    <!--legend-->
    <circle />
</svg>

<!-- remove: all gaps stripped -->
<svg>
    <rect />
    <!--legend-->
    <circle />
</svg>

<!-- truncate (default): 2+ collapsed to 1 -->
<svg>
    <rect />

    <!--legend-->
    <circle />
</svg>

<!-- insert: force gap between every sibling -->
<svg>
    <rect />

    <!--legend-->

    <circle />
</svg>
```

oneOf.description: Strip all blank lines between siblings.
Keep blank lines from source verbatim.
Force exactly 1 blank line between every sibling.

QuoteStyleConfig.title: Quoting strategy for attribute values.
QuoteStyleConfig.description:
Maps 1:1 to [`svg_format::QuoteStyle`].

```svg
<!-- preserve: keeps original -->
<rect id='box' class="hero" />

<!-- double -->
<rect id="box" class="hero" />

<!-- single -->
<rect id='box' class='hero' />
```

TextContentModeConfig.title: How the formatter handles whitespace in text nodes.
TextContentModeConfig.description:
Maps 1:1 to [`svg_format::TextContentMode`].

```svg
<!-- input -->
<text>  hello   world  </text>

<!-- collapse -->
<text>
    hello world
</text>

<!-- maintain (default): preserves relative indentation -->
<text>
    hello   world
</text>

<!-- prettify: trims each line -->
<text>
    hello   world
</text>
```

oneOf.description: Collapse whitespace runs to single spaces.
Trim each line and re-indent to SVG depth.

WrappedAttributeIndentConfig.title: Indentation strategy for wrapped attributes.
WrappedAttributeIndentConfig.description:
Maps 1:1 to [`svg_format::WrappedAttributeIndent`].

```svg
<!-- one-level (default) -->
<linearGradient
    id="sky"
    x1="0%">
</linearGradient>

<!-- align-to-tag-name -->
<linearGradient
                id="sky"
                x1="0%">
</linearGradient>
```

oneOf.description: Indent one level deeper than the tag.
